# name struct tag rebinds the request field name

muxt generate --use-receiver-type=T
muxt check

exec go test -cover

-- template.gohtml --
{{define "POST /upload 201 Upload(multipart)" }}<p>{{.Result}}</p>{{end}}

-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22
-- template.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
	"mime/multipart"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type UploadForm struct {
	DisplayName string                `name:"display-name"`
	Picture     *multipart.FileHeader `name:"profile-picture"`
}

type T struct {
	spy func(UploadForm) string
}

func (t T) Upload(multipart UploadForm) string {
	return t.spy(multipart)
}
-- template_test.go --
package server

import (
	"bytes"
	"mime/multipart"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"testing"
)

func Test(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()

	var service T
	service.spy = func(form UploadForm) string {
		if form.DisplayName != "Ada" {
			t.Errorf("DisplayName = %q, want Ada", form.DisplayName)
		}
		if form.Picture == nil || form.Picture.Filename != "p.png" {
			t.Errorf("Picture = %+v, want filename p.png", form.Picture)
		}
		return form.DisplayName
	}

	TemplateRoutes(mux, service)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	w := multipart.NewWriter(body)
	if err := w.WriteField("display-name", "Ada"); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	fw, err := w.CreateFormFile("profile-picture", "p.png")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	if _, err := fw.Write([]byte("PNGDATA")); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	if err := w.Close(); err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/upload", body)
	req.Header.Set("content-type", w.FormDataContentType())
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()

	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	if rec.Result().StatusCode != http.StatusCreated {
		t.Errorf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Result().StatusCode, http.StatusCreated)
	}
}
